steps.title: Express each quantity in terms of n
steps.content:
From the problem:
  • Number of 8-inch parts: $n$
  • Number of 9-inch parts: $4n$ (given as 4 times the 8-inch parts)
  • Number of 3-inch parts: 15

steps.title: Sum all parts and simplify
steps.content:
All part quantities must sum to 100:
$$4n + n + 15 = 100$$
Combining the $n$ terms: $4n + n = 5n$, which gives:
$$5n + 15 = 100$$
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
